category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a shortcut for the ps aux | grep idiom; official project page repeats that description.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is psgrep; official project page title is psgrep.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages project page provides installation and usage notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jvz/psgrep; per instruction, repo not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official page describe a shell helper around ps and grep.
